layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Mode A (Tetris/Asymmetric). Avoid symmetric columns. Use overlapping images and text blocks, plenty of negative space.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none for sharp luxury feel, or max rounded-sm for subtle inputs

motion_and_interaction.animations: Framer Motion. Slow fade-ins, gentle upward transforms (y: 20 -> 0) with duration > 0.8s and easeOut. NO bouncy springs.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Subtle text color shifts to gold, image scale up (1.05) in overflow-hidden containers.

ui_components.buttons: Square corners (rounded-none). Primary: bg-[#c5a059] text-black hover:bg-[#dfb768]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#c5a059] text-[#c5a059] hover:bg-[#c5a059]/10.
ui_components.navigation: Fixed header with crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0a0908]/70). Logo centered or left. Explicit navigation links, NO hamburger menu on desktop.
ui_components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select, Popover, Calendar. Override Vercel look with dark backgrounds (bg-[#141211]), thin border (#272321), square corners, and gold focus rings.
ui_components.menu_list: Elegant editorial layout. Dotted lines connecting dish name to price, or space-between flexbox. Ingredients in smaller, secondary text.

hero_background.description: Main hero background. Use bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text contrast.

texture_wine.description: Dark red wine pouring. For Cave/Drinks or About section.

dish_vongole.description: Linguine alle vongole. Menu highlight or gallery.

dish_burrata.description: Burrata di Puglia. Menu highlight or gallery.

dish_tiramisu.description: Tiramisu tradizionale. Menu highlight or gallery.

content_strategy.tone: Refined, intimate, Dolce Vita, highly sensory.

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Immersive image, massive typography (SOGNO), elegant reservation CTA.

sections.name: La Storia
sections.description: About section explaining the Italian heritage and Trocadéro location. Asymmetric imagery.

sections.name: Menu
sections.description: Divided into Antipasti, Piatti Principali, Dolci. Real data: Burrata (13€), Vitello Tonnato (18€), Linguine Vongole (28€), Ossobuco (29€).

sections.name: Reservation
sections.description: Premium booking form (Date, Time, Guests, Details). Highly styled Shadcn components.

sections.name: Footer
sections.description: Massive SOGNO text, 42 Rue de l'Amiral Hamelin, 75016 Paris. Contact info.

testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Bodoni Moda and Manrope via Google Fonts in CSS/Tailwind config.
Use raw HTML and Tailwind (div, section) for complex overlapping marketing layouts; only use Shadcn for the reservation form components.
Implement Lenis for smooth scroll. Use Framer Motion for text reveals (staggered letters/lines) and fade-ins.
Never use pure white text, always #fdfbf7. Never use full black, always #0a0908.
Follow 'E1' spacing: generous p-12 to p-24.
In the menu, ensure prices and descriptions match the real scraped data.
Do NOT hide desktop navigation behind a hamburger menu.
